generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a report that domestic security agencies are struggling to keep up with emerging threats. We can't afford to be complacent - expanding their powers is about being proactive, not about overreach. Look at how many attacks have been prevented by intelligence work. We need to give them the tools to do their jobs properly. #NationalSecurityMatters
